name: Creepypastas pool party
description:
Nina invited ALMOST everyone to a pool party, full with floaters, table a food and so on. Masky/tim, hoodie/brian, Toby, Jeff, Nina, Jane, laughing jack, eyeless jack, Slenderman, etc.

I got this idea when I was chatting up with Brian, Toby, and Tim on here. Btw not every character will be on this because I’m lazy <3 good luck!

(Update: added Kate the chaser. And also another message for you all to make your own scenario!)
creator: NobodyButMe10
